arts.ttl: Liverpool ‘very interested’ in player after impressive two seasons – Scouts keeping a close eye on him
arts.sum: Liverpool have added SC Braga defender Sikou Niakaté to their list of potential options to replace Ibrahima Konaté if he leaves for Paris Saint-Germain. That’s according to Africa Foot, who report that Liverpool are ‘very interested’ in the Braga centre-back ahead of a potentially busy summer. arts.ttl: Arsenal's next trip to Merseyside will now include final Liverpool humiliation
arts.sum: Arsenal face the humiliating prospect of travelling to Liverpool for their clash on May 11 with the Reds already Premier League champions after dropping points against Everton on Saturday

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Man Utd & Chelsea Must All Target ‘Ridiculous Talent’ After Most Recent Display
arts.sum: Ipswich Town star Liam Delap has reaffirmed his credentials with another goal amid rumours of a move to a Premier League 'big six' club.

arts.ttl: When Liverpool can win Premier League title as Arsenal drop more points
arts.sum: Liverpool watched on as Arsenal dropped more points, this time at Everton, meaning they can further extend their lead ahead of a potentially confirmed themselves as champions in late April

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold replacement: Conor Bradley, Jeremie Frimpong assessed as Liverpool transfer rumours swirl
arts.sum: The likely exit of Trent Alexander-Arnold to Real Madrid has led to speculation that Liverpool could look to sign Bayer Leverkusen wing-back Jeremie Frimpong.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot called out Liverpool star in training as Ibrahima Konate admits Virgil van Dijk challenge
arts.sum: Ibrahima Konate has revealed how Arne Slot made an instant impression after taking over as Liverpool head coach and opened up about his centre-back partnership with Virgil van Dijk

arts.ttl: 'I became crazy' - Ibrahima Konate shuts down Michael Owen claim and reveals Liverpool hope
arts.sum: Ibrahima Konate is adamant that Liverpool are enjoying a special season and he shared his trophy ambitions

arts.ttl: Manager turning to former Liverpool man to fix club’s problem – Anfield expertise can come un useful
arts.sum: RB Leipzig’s interim manager Zsolt Löw is turning is set to turn to former Liverpool coach Peter Krawietz in the hope he can turn around their inefficiency from set pieces. arts.ttl: Everton 1-1 Arsenal: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Ndiaye penalty edges Liverpool closer to Premier League title
arts.sum: Everton's Iliman Ndiaye scores a second-half penalty to hold Arsenal to a 1-1 draw in Saturday's Premier League clash at Goodison Park.

arts.ttl: Liverpool could win Premier League title sooner than you think after Arsenal drop points
arts.sum: Liverpool are edging closer to winning the Premier League after Arsenal dropped points away at Everton
